title: Race Enricher Input
description: Configuration for the race enrichment actor.

supabaseUrl.title: Supabase URL
supabaseUrl.description: The URL of your Supabase project (e.g. https://xyz.supabase.co).

supabaseServiceKey.title: Supabase Service Role Key
supabaseServiceKey.description: The service role key for your Supabase project.

apifyToken.title: Apify Token
apifyToken.description: Apify API token — needed to run website-content-crawler.

maxRaces.title: Max Races to Enrich
maxRaces.description: Maximum number of races to enrich per run. Default: 20.

maxCrawlPages.title: Max Crawl Pages per Race
maxCrawlPages.description: Maximum pages to crawl per race website. Default: 2.

dryRun.title: Dry Run
dryRun.description: When enabled, logs what would be updated but does not modify the database.
